note: Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (80053) already includes the Basic Metabolic Panel (80048); billing both double-charges the shared tests.
CBC with differential (85025) includes the CBC without differential (85027).
CBC with differential (85025) includes the automated differential count (85004).
Lipid panel (80061) includes serum total cholesterol (82465).
Routine venipuncture (36415) is generally bundled into lab panel payment and is often not separately billable.
A two-view chest X-ray (71046) and a single-view chest X-ray (71045) should not both be billed for the same study.
Only one "initial" infusion service is allowed per encounter; IV infusion initial hour (96365) and IV push initial (96374) cannot both be primary.
Only one established-patient E&M office-visit level may be billed per encounter.
